name: CountdownTimer
description: Live countdown timer for auction and event countdowns. Supports multiple size variants with automatic status detection (active, ended, upcoming).

endTime.description: Target timestamp (Unix ms or Date object) when the countdown ends

startTime.description: Optional start time for detecting 'upcoming' status before countdown begins

variant.description: Size variant controlling container, text sizes, and spacing

label.description: Label text shown above the timer display

onComplete.description: Callback fired when countdown reaches zero

endedMessage.description: Custom message displayed when countdown has ended

upcomingMessage.description: Custom message displayed when countdown has not yet started

showDays.description: Show days segment when remaining time exceeds 24 hours

examples.name: Large variant with callback
examples.code: <CountdownTimer variant="large" endTime={eventTime} onComplete={() => alert('Time is up!')} />
